response.overview: It tells the story of how Azim manages four wives when they all become trapped in one house during lockdown. How cunning Azim is when trying to avoid his wives finding out that he is already married to four women. No matter how clever a squirrel is at jumping, it will eventually fall to the ground—will Azim be able to handle the various demands of his wives.
response.title: Bini-Bini Lockdown
